case_number: constitutional petition is dismissed as not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-1281 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.7616/2016 (S/A). 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 10.03.2022 Mr. Habibullah G.Ghouri, Advocate for the petitioners Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, A.A.G Sindh. ------ At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioners that he would not press the disposal of instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, provided the petitioners are permitted to exhaust their remedy before the Secretary, Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, in accordance with law. In view of above, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed as not pressed. The petitioners however, may exhaust their remedy before the Secretary, Education and Literacy Department, Government of Sindh, if it is permitted by law. J JUDGE
